memory.Invalid Size Warning: Invalid Condition: The "Max Size" cannot be smaller than the "Min Size"

searchCriteria.OverallDescribe: Displays the memory sizes of operators in the Reserved, Allocated, and Active states and the overall Memory Reserved size of PyTorch.
searchCriteria.StreamDescribe: Displays the memory sizes of operators in the Reserved, Allocated, and Active states by stream.
searchCriteria.OperatorAllocatedDescribe: Operator Allocated includes the memory occupied by both PyTorch and GE, while Operator Activated only includes the memory occupied by PyTorch.
searchCriteria.Name: Name
